text: I just got a call from someone saying they are from the IRS and I owe taxes. Is this real?

⚠️ **Likely Scam Detected**
The IRS will **never** call you to demand immediate payment, nor will they ask for payment via gift cards, wire transfers, or cryptocurrency. Hang up immediately. Do not provide any personal information.
They left a voicemail with a callback number: 800-555-0199.
I've checked that number against our SafeNet database. It has been reported **42 times** in the last 24 hours for similar tax scams. I have automatically submitted a report to flag this number.
